predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual average employee threshold of 50 in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover threshold of 11,250,000 EUR (excl. VAT) in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold of 6,000,000 EUR in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the three statutory criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year (two consecutive years).

predicates.name: ceases_to_exceed_more_than_one_criterion_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company ceases to exceed more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year (two consecutive years).

predicates.name: previous_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is immediately before the first financial year.

predicates.name: next_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is immediately after the first financial year.

predicates.name: is_kleine_vennootschap
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a kleine vennootschap (small company) as of the given financial year.

predicates.name: loses_kleine_vennootschap_status_from
predicates.description: The company loses kleine vennootschap status starting from this financial year, because it exceeded more than one criterion for two consecutive years.

predicates.name: gains_kleine_vennootschap_status_from
predicates.description: The company gains kleine vennootschap status starting from this financial year, because it ceased to exceed more than one criterion for two consecutive years.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding VAT of the company in the financial year, in EUR.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in EUR.
